name: Bloomin' Sauce & Dip
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Picante Sauce (Pace medium or hot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sour cream, picante sauce, and cream cheese in a bowl.
2. Add minced garlic and season with Lowry's seasoned salt to taste.
3. Mix until well combined.
4. Allow the mixture to chill in the refrigerator for at least 24 hours to thicken. Enjoy!
